title: Icabu totems
description: Totems of players of Icabu server
body:

# Icabu totems
### Resource pack for [Icabu](https://discord.com/invite/a88WGSDYtr) server
## About resourse pack
It Resource pack that replaces the totem texture with server player skins when renaming
## About server
Icabu is Russian-speaking, steampunk-themed survival minecraft server

_**To play on the server, you need to submit an application on [Discord](https://dsc.gg/icabu)**_

## The project is archived due to the termination of support for [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and the release of [My Totem Doll](https://modrinth.com/mod/my_totem_doll)

<details>
<summary>List of skins</summary>

```
_Fire_Dragon_
_Grass_Cube_
```
